New Arrival〰️Classic 19 Black Sand Silver Buckle
Low-key with a full sense of high-end retro

Becoming the classic trendsetter of the season〰️
Three carrying ways: Shoulder, Crossbody, Handheld

items.name_en: 2024 New Color. This Book Tote bag, designed by Dior Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, is a flagship piece embodying Dior aesthetics. Adorned with apricot and green Reverse Joules print embroidery throughout, it reinterprets the classic pattern with a contrasting effect, perfect for holding various daily essentials. Medium size, featuring a Christian Dior Paris logo on the front, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, and can be carried by hand or over the shoulder.

items.name_en: 2024 New Fall/Winter PARIS VII POCHON
items.name_cn:
2024 New Fall/Winter PARIS VII POCHON
The new pochon design is unique and practical, with soft leather and a spacious interior... It holds everything from your phone, wallet, to cosmetics. The exquisite drawstring design offers security while adding a touch of fashion! The fine, smooth leather texture fits the wearer's body perfectly. Ultra-lightweight and extra-large capacity, creating a romantic and elegant French relaxed vibe🖤
Style No.: 804302
Size: 24x30x12CM

2024 New Fall/Winter PARIS VII POCHON

items.name_en: 2024 New LE 5A 7 HOBO
items.name_cn:
2024 New LE 5A 7 HOBO
Y's 2024 Autumn New LE 5A 7 Handbag, continuing the classic hobo style, minimalist yet designed! The bag is made of black grained cowhide, with a slender leather strip running through the opening. The gold letter logo buckle becomes the focal point, paired with a black suede leather lining. The practical bucket shape adapts to both casual vacation and city scenes!
Model: 793088
Size: 26x31.5x15cm

specs.rawTitle:
2024 New LE 5A 7 HOBO

items.name_en: 2024 Summer New Arrival, by the pool series beach vacation style onthego, tote bag shopping bag. Model: M11262 Blue. Original leather, full steel hardware.
items.name_cn:
2024 Summer New Arrival, by the pool series beach vacation style onthego, tote bag shopping bag. Model: M11262 Blue. Original leather, full steel hardware.
This OnTheGo medium tote features Monogram Tiles canvas with a watercolor effect Monogram print, highlighting the LV Circle logo in the center. Calfskin handles and a hidden shoulder strap, rivets on the corner straps, ample space to hold a laptop and daily essentials. Dimensions: 35 x 27 x 14 cm.

items.name_en: 2024 Summer Resort Style New Shopping Bag Neverfull, Model: M23517, Original Leather, Full Steel Hardware.
items.name_cn:
2024 Summer Resort Style New Shopping Bag Neverfull, Model: M23517, Original Leather, Full Steel Hardware.
Neverfull Medium Bag M25317 Pink (Summer 2024)
Featuring a tote silhouette crafted from Monogram Tiles canvas, accented with leather trim outlining the top and handles. The central Circle logo complements the watercolor Monogram pattern, and the zippered pouch can be removed for separate use.
Size: 31 x 28 x 14 cm.

items.name_en: 2025 Fall/Winter Collection, the GG Emblem series reinterprets the brand's timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship. This bucket bag features a cotton webbing lining and an internal compartment, offering excellent practicality.
items.name_cn:
2025 Fall/Winter Collection, the GG Emblem series reinterprets the brand's timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship. This bucket bag features a cotton webbing lining and an internal compartment, offering excellent practicality.
Black GG embossed leather
Light gold-tone hardware
Black cotton-linen blend lining
Top handle with hook closure (height: 14 cm)
Also features a D-ring for hanging removable items
Interior: two compartments and a central snap-button compartment
Removable and adjustable leather shoulder strap (height: 52 cm - 57.5 cm; length: 107 cm - 114 cm)
Magnetic snap-button closure
Model: 815118.
Dimensions: 19 cm (W) x 18 cm (H) x 11 cm (D)
Weight: approx. 0.45 kg
Color: Black embossed/Original leather.
Made in Italy
